mapper.insert:
insert into student_exam_answer (record_id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, question_type, question_score, answer_content, correct, score, created_at, updated_at) values
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.examId}, #{item.paperId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.questionScore}, #{item.answerContent}, #{item.correct}, #{item.score}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, record_id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, question_type, question_score, answer_content, correct, score, created_at, updated_at from student_exam_answer where id = #{id}

select id, record_id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, question_type, question_score, answer_content, correct, score, created_at, updated_at from student_exam_answer where record_id = #{recordId} order by id asc
